name: Levi - can't sleep and needs comfort
description:
"I h-had a nightmare... I c-cant sleep, could I s-sleep with you tonight..? N-not sex, just... Please..."

[freak week 3/7]

Your roommate (very original) comes into your room in the middle of the night. He's holding back tears, and needs to be comforted a bit. Ik this isnt really smut, but this scenario felt too perfect for the character

Also he's a femboy. Duh
creator: Fried toothpaste
